summary: Comprehensive testing of Enterprise SaaS Task Management app iteration 5 features. All 10 features tested - 10 PASSED. Dashboard cards, chart legends, pinned task navigation, project sorting/filtering, meeting/project form auto-fill, task detail meeting+project display, and subtask creation all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Task API correctly returns meeting_project_title and meeting_project_id_resolved via LEFT JOIN on meetings->projects
Dashboard cards 1&2 show Active/Open count in large font with 'X of Y total' in small font
Chart options correctly have legend.display: false for cards 5&6
openTask(id) method navigates to /tasks/:id correctly for pinned tasks
Project list has all sort options (Created Date, Start Date, Name, Code, Priority) and filter options (Owner, Priority, Status)
Meeting form onOwnerChange() auto-fills location_id from user profile
Task form auto-fills category=subtask, parent_task_id from query params, and resolves parent's project/meeting names
Auth signup auto-creates company with org name in companies table
seed_data_creation: Created location 'Head Office' (id=1) and assigned to Admin User for testing meeting form auto-fill
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features verified working. Task 'Design Homepage' (TSK-0001) is linked to meeting 'Sprint Planning' which is linked to project 'Website Redesign'. Task detail page shows both meeting AND meeting's project names in header. Dashboard pinned task click navigates to /tasks/:id detail page. Project list has full sort/filter functionality. Meeting form auto-fills location when owner with location_id is selected.

verified_features.dashboard_card_1_projects: ✅ Shows '1' (active count) in large font, 'Active of 1 total' in small text
verified_features.dashboard_card_2_meetings: ✅ Shows '1' (open count) in large font, 'Open of 1 total' in small text
verified_features.dashboard_charts_no_legends: ✅ Cards 5&6 (Tasks Trend, Meetings Trend) have legend.display: false
verified_features.pinned_task_click_navigation: ✅ Clicking pinned task navigates to /tasks/1 (detail page), NOT /tasks (list)
verified_features.projects_sort_dropdown: ✅ Sort options: Created Date, Start Date, Name, Code, Priority
verified_features.projects_sorting_by_name: ✅ Sorting by Name reorders projects correctly
verified_features.task_detail_meeting_project: ✅ Task header shows 'Sprint Planning' (meeting) AND 'Website Redesign' (meeting's project)
verified_features.meeting_form_owner_autofill: ✅ Selecting owner with location_id auto-fills location field to 'Head Office'
verified_features.subtask_form_autofill: ✅ Add Subtask sets category='Subtask', parent='TSK-0001 - Design Homepage', shows Project/Meeting context in header

api_verification.task_api_meeting_project: GET /api/tasks/1 returns meeting_title='Sprint Planning', meeting_project_title='Website Redesign', meeting_project_id_resolved=1
api_verification.dashboard_stats: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns total_projects=1, active_projects=1, total_meetings=1, open_meetings=1

rca_of_the_issues.no_issues_found: All 10 features working as expected. Implementation is complete and functional.
